completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: Flutter multi-platform app (mobile type). pubspec.yaml detected with Dart >=3.11.0 <4.0.0, Flutter SDK dependency.
Found 6 existing docs: README.md, PR template, dependabot.yaml, CI workflow main.yaml, LICENSE (MIT 2023-2026), cspell.json (200+ terms)
Tech stack: Flutter 3.41+ / Dart 3.11+, BLoC 9.x + Freezed 3.x + fpdart 1.2 + ObjectBox 5.x + Drift 2.32+, flutter_launcher_icons 0.14.3, very_good_analysis 10.2.0

Exhaustive scan: 3 domain entities (TimeEntry, WageHourly, PaymentResult), 8 use cases, 6 BLoCs + 2 Cubits, 37+ widgets, 4 features (home/payment/times/wage), 4 datasources (2 ObjectBox + 2 Drift), 4 repository implementations, custom app icons via flutter_launcher_icons with 3 per-flavor configs

Source tree documented with complete lib/src/ structure (131 non-generated files, 136 total), root config files including build.yaml, dart_test.yaml, flutter_launcher_icons-*.yaml, time-money-logo.png, design-artifacts/ directory
Dev setup, build commands, test commands (373 tests across 70 files), CI/CD pipeline (8 jobs), app icon regeneration via dart run flutter_launcher_icons documented
Architecture documentation validated: Feature-first Clean Architecture + dual datasource + platform-aware DI (no changes needed, already accurate)

All supporting docs written: project-overview.md (updated with flutter_launcher_icons, MIT license, file counts), source-tree-analysis.md (added build.yaml, dart_test.yaml, flutter_launcher_icons configs, design-artifacts/), development-guide.md (added App Icons section, test tag config, build.yaml details, pipeline features), data-models.md (validated accurate), component-inventory.md (validated accurate)
Master index.md regenerated with app icons reference, cspell.json in existing docs, flutter_launcher_icons in getting started
Validation complete: no incomplete documentation markers detected, all 6 generated doc files present and cross-linked

Workflow complete. Documentation regenerated to reflect: custom app icons (flutter_launcher_icons), MIT LICENSE, build.yaml/dart_test.yaml configs, design-artifacts directory, updated file counts, cspell.json reference

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. All documentation generated and validated.
